\//o\/\//o//\//o//\//\o//\projects

projects

material programming workshops →

Series of student-facing workshops on developing software for the Kniterate machine

open knit tools index →

Collaborative index and landscape analysis of open knitting design software.

material programming talks series →

Monthly practice talks with knit and software researchers and practicioners, for Spring and Summer 2026.

malleable knitting software →

Developing new programming tools for knit based on the knitout interchange format.

knit tech reading group →

Monthly reading group to discuss contemporary research in knitting technology
